description: Ketubba according to the Egyptian rite. Location: Fustat. Dated: 13 Nisan 1606 Seleucid = 31 March 1295 CE. Groom: Elʿazar b. Avraham (s't). Bride: Sara bt. Elʿazar (n'e). Marriage payment is 50 dinars (effacement makes it unclear if division is 10+40 or 20+30). No dowry listed, but includes marriage conditions including rules of nidda that wife is agreeing to. Information from the Reif catalog via FGP and RR
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
